# Kennedy Family Genealogy

## Description
US Kennedy family genealogy in GEDCOM 5.5.1 format. Contains a complete family tree of the famous American political family including multiple generations, various relationships, and real-world genealogical data.

## Test Case Type
- **Real-world family tree**: Comprehensive genealogy of a well-known family
- **Political genealogy testing**: Tests handling of historically significant family structures
- **Medium-sized dataset**: Good for general parsing and import testing

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 5.5.1
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: ~25 KB
- **Encoding**: UTF-8
- **Source Software**: MyFamilyTree

## Provenance
- **Source**: Chronoplex Software - My Family Tree Samples
- **URL**: https://chronoplexsoftware.com/myfamilytree/samples/
- **Availability**: Public sample files
- **Collection Date**: Various versions available

## License & Usage
- **License**: Publicly available sample data
- **Attribution**: Chronoplex Software
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: None specified for educational use

## Testing Coverage
- Complex family relationships
- Multiple marriage scenarios
- Long-running genealogical lines
- Real biographical data with dates and places
- Large number of individuals and families

## Notes
- This file is suitable for testing import functionality with real genealogical data
- Contains actual historical figures and their family relationships
- Good for testing parser robustness with larger, complex family structures
- May include sources and citations depending on export options used
